mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lecture ( member_id, major_id, year, semester, name, credit, type, ref_books, goal, weekly_plan, academic_year, max_std, start_date, end_date ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{majorId}, #{year}, #{semester}, #{lectureName}, #{credit}, #{lectureType}, #{refBooks}, #{goal}, #{weeklyPlan}, #{academicYear}, #{maxStd}, #{startDate}, #{endDate} )

INSERT INTO lecture_schedule ( lecture_id, room_id, day_of_week, start_period, end_period ) VALUES ( #{lectureId}, (SELECT room_id FROM lecture_room WHERE room_number = #{roomNumber} LIMIT 1), #{dayOfWeek}, #{startPeriod}, #{endPeriod} )
mapper.select: select l.status, l.lectureType, l.lectureName, l.proName, l.credit, ls.day_of_week, lr.building, l.academicYear,l.maxStd, l.is_open from lecture l left join lecture_schedule ls on l.lecture_id=ls.lecture_id left join lecture_room lr on ls.room_id=lr.room_id where l.status = 'before'
